member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.AlertConditionController.Get
member.remarks: Returns the current alert condition
member.returns: An object containing all details about the alert condition

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.BuildsController.Get
member.remarks: Returns all builds

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.BuildsController.Get(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Returns specified build details
member.returns: A dictionary containing specified build id

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.BuildsController.GetSettings
member.remarks: Gets the configuration settings for builds

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.BuildsController.UpdateSettings(LCARS.ViewModels.Builds.Settings)
member.remarks: Updates the configuration settings for builds

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.DeploymentsController.Get
member.remarks: Returns a the status of each configured deployment project and environment
member.response: Returns a the status of each configured deployment project and environment
member.returns: Returns a the status of each configured deployment project and environment

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.DeploymentsController.GetSettings
member.remarks: Gets the configuration settings for deployments

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.DeploymentsController.UpdateSettings(LCARS.ViewModels.Deployments.Settings)
member.remarks: Updates the configuration settings for deployments

member.name: T:LCARS.Controllers.DiagnosticsController
member.summary: Diagnostics for all services calling 3rd party endpoints

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetCurrentStatus
member.remarks: Returns all running builds
member.response: Returns a test response from all external APIs
member.returns: A list of all APIs and their current status

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.Get
member.remarks: Returns a the status of each configured environment
member.response: Returns a the status of each configured environment
member.returns: Returns a the status of each configured environment

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.PostSite(LCARS.ViewModels.Environments.Site)
member.remarks: Adds a new site to the environments screen
member.returns: New site object, with ID populated

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.PostEnvironment(LCARS.ViewModels.Environments.SiteEnvironment)
member.remarks: Adds a new environment to a site
member.returns: New environment object, with ID populated

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.PutSite(LCARS.ViewModels.Environments.Site)
member.remarks: Updates a site

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.PutEnvironment(LCARS.ViewModels.Environments.SiteEnvironment)
member.remarks: Updates an environment

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.DeleteSite(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Deletes a site

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.EnvironmentsController.DeleteEnvironment(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Deletes a site

member.remarks: Returns a list of all branches for the configured repository
member.response: Returns a list of all branches for the configured repository
member.returns: A list of all branches for the configured repository

member.remarks: Returns a list of all open pull requests for the configured repository

member.returns: A list of all open pull requests for the configured repository

member.remarks: Returns a list of all PR comments for the configured repository
member.response: Returns a list of all PR comments for the configured repositor
member.returns: A list of all PR comments for the configured repositor

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.GitHubController.GetSummary
member.remarks: Returns a list of all branches for the configured repository
member.response: Returns a list of all branches for the configured repository
member.returns: A list of all branches for the configured repository

member.remarks: Gets the configuration settings for GitHub

member.remarks: Updates the configuration settings for GitHub

member.name: M:LCARS.Controllers.IssuesController.GetIssues(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Returns a list of all issues for a stored query
member.response: Returns a list of issues resulting from the stored query

member.response: Returns a summary of backlog for a specified query

member.remarks: Returns a list of all issues for a stored query
